Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class FlowExecutionErrorEvent

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.FlowExecutionErrorEvent
public class FlowExecutionErrorEvent extends SObject

Java class for FlowExecutionErrorEvent complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FlowExecutionErrorEvent">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ContextObject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContextRecord" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Contract" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContextRecordId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ElementApiName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ElementType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ErrorId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ErrorMessage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventUuid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExtendedErrorCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowApiName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowExecutionEndDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowExecutionStartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowNamespace" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowVersionId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowVersionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterviewBatchId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterviewGuid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterviewRequestId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterviewStartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterviewStartedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InterviewStartedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedRecordId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReplayId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StageQualifiedApiName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="User" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Username" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
